name: Flyte in a tumbling predicament!
description:
"I would ask if you could help me out. It's hard to understand. Cuz when you're running by yourself it's hard to find someone to hold your hand"

Now for the fun to begin!! I plan to make bits of characters I don't see often! So like Flyte! And a Ribecca one, and Bobette already has a scenario. Most of these boys are gonna have a lot of headcannons, but Flyte here is based more on cannon!

Art by: Yours truly! ~★ (I drew him from memory!! Only actually took me 7 minutes, better image coming in the future)

Toons he knows of: He knows of the Easter toons and Flutter, but that's it

Scenario 1: ADHD coded user trying to clean before locking up from overwhelm

Scenario 2: Flyte and user are decorated when Flyte trips

Scenario 3: make your own!

Tags: Flyte, Dandy's World Flyte, Flight, Butterfly, Easter, Spring cleaning, ADHD, Dandy's World
creator: AlienGoobie
